programmes.show_description: Seth Meyers with guests. (US TX: 10 Mar 2025). (Ep1777)
When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading.
"Fast Money" is America's post-market show.
The Phantom Fraudsters of Broadway: New York stockbroker Mark Hotton steals millions from investors and causes the Broadway premiere of "Rebecca" to implode. (Ep124)
Novartis' Vas Narasimhan: Guided by immigrant roots, public health purpose and a belief in "staying in the ring," Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan reflects on the unlikely decisions he made.
The DNA of every successful company comes from its founders. Dig into the stories of the people behind top brands, including bubble tea franchise Gong Cha and fintech company Airwallex. (Ep1)
Gordon Ramsay: CNBC's Tania Bryer gets 'up close and personal' with some of the world's most famous faces from the world of business, politics, sport, and the arts.
Inside Lowe's: This episode takes you inside Lowe's, one of America's biggest brands in home improvement.

Squawk Box Asia is CNBC's flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories.
